data.content:
Use the `--framework` flag:

```
dotnet test --framework net9.0
```

The command ran successfully targeting only net9.0. It appears the project built fine but no tests were discovered — you may need to check that the test framework NuGet packages (e.g., `MSTest.TestAdapter`, `xunit.runner.visualstudio`, etc.) are referenced in the project.
